name: pre-commit-hook-config-tests
description: Write pytest unit tests that verify pre-commit hook configuration from YAML (skip lists, severity flags, files: patterns) without invoking pre-commit itself. Use when: (1) a security tool hook has an intentional skip list that needs documented rationale, (2) verifying a hook's files: regex matches expected paths, (3) ensuring suppressed warnings reflect real usage in the codebase.
